question:
Will FC Lorient vs. Paris Saint-Germain FC end in a draw?

Description: In the upcoming game, scheduled for October 29, 2025
If the game ends in a draw, this market will resolve to "Yes".
Otherwise, this market will resolve to "No".
If the game is postponed, this market will remain open until the game has been completed.
If the game is canceled entirely, with no make-up game, this market will resolve to "Yes".

Resolution source: https://www.ligue1.com/

evidences.title: Lorient vs PSG – Match preview and team news - Yahoo Sports
evidences.content: ## PSG The defending French and European champions sit top of the Ligue 1 table with 20 points after nine matches. Luis Enrique’s side secured a commanding 3-0 away victory over Brest in their previous league fixture, with goals from Achraf Hakimi and Desire Doue. PSG have been in excellent form, losing just one of their last 13 matches across all competitions. Their attacking prowess has been evident with goals scored in six straight matches. ## Predicted Lineups Lorient: Mvogo; Meïté, Talbi, Yongwa; Le Bris, Avom, Abergel, Kouassi; Makengo, Pagis; Aiyegun. PSG: Chevalier; Zaire-Emery, Zabarnyi, Marquinhos, Mendes; Mayulu, Vitinha, Kang-in; Barcola, Dembele, Kvaratskhelia. ## How to Watch Lorient vs PSG? [...] Ballon d’Or winner Ousmane Dembélé made his return against Brest in the league after making an impact against Bayer Leverkusen earlier in the Champions League. He is back in the squad after missing several weeks with a hamstring injury. The French winger is expected to start and add further firepower to PSG’s attack. ## Form ## Lorient Les Merlus are enduring a difficult campaign and currently sit 16th in the Ligue 1 table with just eight points from nine matches. They su...

evidences.title: PSG Injuries and Suspensions News - NewsNow
evidences.content: Suspensions present additional selection challenges, with Ligue 1's disciplinary system and UEFA's separate regulations for European competitions requiring careful player management. The French football federation's disciplinary committee occasionally reviews incidents retrospectively, while yellow card accumulation across different tournaments necessitates tactical adjustments by the coaching staff. [...] #### About our PSG Injuries and Suspensions news Latest news on PSG Injuries and Suspensions, covering player fitness updates, team news, recovery timelines, and match availability for Paris Saint-Germain. Paris Saint-Germain, a dominant force in French football and a major player on the European stage, consistently manages various fitness challenges that impact squad selection across domestic and continental competitions. The Parisian club's medical department, operating from the state-of-the-art Campus PSG training facility, implements sophisticated rehabilitation protocols for squad members experiencing different injury concerns. evidences.title: Herba Guirassy: Nantes’ record-breaking winger announces himself in style
evidences.content: SCO Angers AJ Auxerre AS Monaco Stade Brestois Lorient Havre AC LOSC OGC Nice Olympique Lyonnais Olympique de Marseille Paris FC Paris Saint-Germain RC Lens Rennes RC Strasbourg Toulouse FC Le Mans FC ESTAC AS Saint-Étienne Boulogne Clermont Foot USL Dunkerque Guingamp Annecy FC Grenoble Stade Lavallois Montpellier HSC AS Nancy-Lorraine Pau FC Red Star Stade de Reims Rodez Aveyron Football FC Metz FC Nantes Dijon FCO FC Sochaux-Montbéliard App Store Google Play store X logo Facebook logo Instagram logo Snapchat logo WhatsApp logo Twitch logo TikTok logo ligue1-logo [...] ### Breaking through under Luis Castro Guirassy has profited off Luís Castro's willingness to trust youth this season with Les Canaris. So far this season, he has two goals and one assist in Ligue 1 McDonald's which are a high output for relatively little game time. He has already matched his scoring output last season in one game for Nantes this season, as he hopes to kick-on to become a regular fixture in Castro's lineup for the rest of the season.
